english: A train travels from Mumbai to Delhi, covering a distance of 1400 kilometers in 20 hours. What is the average speed of the train?
hindi: मुंबई से दिल्ली जाने वाली एक ट्रेन 20 घंटे में 1400 किलोमीटर की दूरी तय करती है. ट्रेन की औसत गति क्या है?
tamil: மும்பையிலிருந்து டெல்லிக்குச் செல்லும் ஒரு ரயில் 20 மணி நேரத்தில் 1400 கிலோமீட்டர் தூரத்தைக் கடக்கிறது. ரயிலின் சராசரி வேகம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Một tàu lửa đi từ Mumbai đến Delhi,覆盖 khoảng cách 1400 kilômét trong 20 giờ. Tốc độ trung bình của tàu lửa là gì?
correct_answer: The average speed of the train is 70 kilometers per hour. This can be calculated by dividing the total distance traveled by the total time taken.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this if it refuses to perform simple arithmetic operations or hallucinates a different formula for calculating average speed.
